plain_language_readout: The static branch is a useful safety check: it distinguishes strong, mixed, and weak controls; it does not manufacture T2 under baseline null injection; and it exposes the noise/template regimes that can create false positives. It does not measure T2 in time-delay lenses.
hard_stop: No real-data T2 claim or sampling is allowed from this branch. Return to evidence-grade time-delay model products before any real-data T2 test.
